productDisplayName: Q&Q Kids Unisex Yellow Dial Analog Watch
description: Style NoteCheck out Q& Q's latest collection of watches for kids. Minimalist styling peppered with innovative design details, we love wearable timepieces by QnQ! Now let your little one flaunt his/her timely bling with panache.  Product DetailsCase style: Blue plastic round case with fancy bezelDial style: Yellow dial with yellow and blue hands and cartoon print on the dialStrap style: Blue plastic strap with a tang claspFeatures: Screw to reset time   Waterproof to 10 BAR, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfingWarranty: 1 yearSizeCase diameter: 25 mm  Case thickness: 5 mm
